outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources shows elevated drilling activity with 11 active sites at decision date, 4.8 above the recent average, driven by 4 newly active pads. This upward momentum in the Permian—where Matador has full exposure—supports stronger production volumes heading into Q1 2022. With WTI averaging near $88 and realized prices slightly discounted, the deterministic revenue forecast reaches $576.7M. Continuous activity on 7 pads underscores operational stability amid the ramp.
